name: rateloop
description: Use RateLoop MCP and skills to ask humans and open raters for public or gated product judgment.

interface.shortDescription: Ask humans and open raters for product judgment
interface.longDescription: RateLoop gives Codex a reusable workflow and MCP tools for asking public or RateLoop-hosted gated questions, creating browser handoff links, quoting funded asks, polling status, and reading auditable results from humans, AI raters, teams, and open raters.
defaultPrompt: Ask RateLoop raters to review this product decision
Create a RateLoop browser handoff for this mockup
Use RateLoop to check whether this answer is supported
